refnamediv.refpurpose: Label connected components in a 2-D image or 3-D volume.

listitem.para: Binary or numeric 2-D image or 3-D scalar volume. Nonzero elements are foreground.
4 or 8 for 2-D input; 6, 18, or 26 for 3-D input. Defaults are 8 and 26 respectively.
Double image or volume whose foreground components contain positive integer labels.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Labels true 3-D components through the native IPCV volume gateway. Face, edge, and corner contact are controlled by 6-, 18-, and 26-connectivity.

refsection.title: Examples
